properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6 v4 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I hear what you're saying At the end of the other line What you said, you'd never do again You did it one more time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You're crushed and you're hopeless 'Cause you fell to the weakness You feel like a fool Wonder if there's grace enough for you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He knows your name Every tear you cry He knows the pain How you feel alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Feel the weight of the blame But mercy longs to reach us In the arms of Jesus There is no shame

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your world's been shattered And your heart's torn in two 'Cause you've done something That you can't undo

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You can't deny and you can't pretend The loss of the innocence And you wish you could forget Another midnight of all your regret

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He knows your name Every tear you cry He knows your pain How you feel alone

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Once you know He's forgiven you And you've forgiven yourself, too Let His mercy flow Till you're white as snow
